debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ C, ∃ (_ : Convex ℝ C), ∃ x y, ∀ (i : Fin n → ℕ) (s : Set (Fin n → ℕ)), ∑ k, x k (i k) + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s
